_comment_bedrock_glm: zai.glm-5 is a non-Claude Bedrock model, so the bedrock provider's apiFor() routes it to Converse automatically (no "api" field needed on the target — that field only exists to override the default). If your account/region rejects the direct model id, switch it to the apac. cross-region inference profile (e.g. "apac.zai.glm-5") instead.
_comment_models: The model key is what Claude Code must send as ANTHROPIC_MODEL — it has to match exactly, since the bedrock provider forwards tool/message content but never rewrites the client-facing model name.
_comment_pricing: Without an override, cost for zai.glm-5 settles at 0 microUSD (recorded with missing=true in the audit log) — there is no bundled rate for non-Claude Bedrock models. Fill in real per-million-token USD prices from the Bedrock pricing page to get accurate billing.
